findings.title: English section heading in LearnMore (TikTok Creator Resources)

findings.title: SettingsScreen vs Make-import structural drift
findings.note: PlanPanel, history list, and section order reflect build-plan subscription copy + real data; not 1:1 Make (intentional product delta).

findings.title: Optimistic niche update only when profile already in cache
findings.note: useUpdateProfile onMutate skips setQueryData if previous is null — rare on Settings after profile load.

findings.title: No Vitest coverage for settings/learn-more flows
findings.note: Suite passes 11/11; add regression tests for logout dialog and useUpdateProfile niche path when prioritized.
